description.from: Throws a spear at the furthest enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG and drawing the enemy in front of the hero. Then deals ??? P.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for 3 sec.
description.to: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing 157*(1+0.3Skill Level)+121.2% of Attack Power as Physical Damage, pulls them in front of you, then deals 105(1+0.3Skill Level)+80.8% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies within range and stuns them for 3 sec.

description.from: Upon blocking enemy attack for 15 sec, triggers a shockwave that deals ??? P.DMG to enemies in range, reducing their ATK by 20%.
description.to: For 7 sec, your Physical Block Chance is increased by 200, and when you block, you deal 95(1+0.3Skill Level)+72.6% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to nearby enemies and reduce their Attack by 25%.

description.from: Upon DMG block during casting, jump attack DMG is increased by 7%. Also, deals ??? P.DMG to enemy and inflicts stun. After casting, jumps and attacks the enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG and stunning them for 4 sec. Gains immunity to CC while the skill is in use.
description.to:
For 8 sec, all allies’ Physical Damage taken is reduced by 20%, and you prepare to leap for 5 sec.
While preparing to leap, when you block, the leap attack’s damage is increased by 7%, you deal 126(1+0.3Skill Level)+96.8% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the attacker, and stun them for 0.4 sec.
When casting is complete, you leap to the enemy, dealing 465(1+0.3Skill Level)+357.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage and stunning them for 2.5 sec.
While preparing to leap, you are immune to status ailments.

description.from: All allies' P.DEF is increased by ??? and P.Block chance is increased by 250.
description.to: Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 30(1+0.3Skill Level) and Physical Block Chance by 250.

IV.from: Stun duration is increased by 2 sec.
IV.to: Increases the duration of stun by 1.2 sec.

light.from: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, pull in 2 enemies.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but pulls in 2 enemies.

dark.from: All pulled enemies take 25% increased DMG from all sources for 10 sec.
dark.to: Reduces the Physical Defense of pulled enemies by 30% for 5 sec.

light.from: Deals extra P.DMG based on P.DEF.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

dark.from: Ally P.DEF is boosted by 20% for 10 sec after activation.
dark.to: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 24% for 7 sec.

dark.from: While casting, all allies take 20% reduced P.DMG.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 6 sec.

light.from: P.DEF is increased by 20% and P. Block is boosted by 50%.
light.to: Physical Defense increase is boosted by 30%, and Physical Block Chance is increased by 75.

dark.from: Recovers HP equal to 40% of P.DEF upon blocking.
dark.to: Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 250.

description.from: [Will to Win] Increases DMG by 50% and P.Weakness of the target by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by 100 and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.

description.from: [Steel Fortress] Mana cost is reduced by 1 and jump attack's Stun duration is increased by {0} sec.
description.to: [Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by 50% and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.

description.from: [Spearhead] Increases DEF boost by 50%. All allies have their P.Crit Resistance increased by {0}.
description.to: [Spearhead] recovers 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking, and increases P.DEF gained by {0}% for 5 sec. P.DEF Boost can stack up to 5 times.

dark.from: At the beginning of every battle, decrease the ATK of all enemies by 20% for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by 25% for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Increases P.DEF of all allies by {0}%. Blocking an enemy attack has a {1}% chance to recover {2}% Mana and reduce Cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
description.to:
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by {0}%.
On block, has a {1}% chance to restore {2} Mana to yourself and reduce the cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
